subject: Complete UI simplification for equilibrium calculator
body:
Major changes:
- Simplified index.html: Removed mode selection, category selection, and framework layers
- Updated to show 5 core pricing models (Subscription, Usage-Based, Per-Seat, One-Time, Marketplace)
- Reorganized forms.js to group inputs by category (Pricing/Seller/Buyer)
- Simplified initialization.js to remove mode switching and framework dependencies
- Streamlined app.js to remove unused imports and complex dependency injection
- Added renderEquilibriumChart() to charts/index.js for static bar chart visualization
- Updated results-display.js to use correct container ID

The calculator now has a clean, focused interface for equilibrium pricing analysis
without the complexity of growth projections, reverse calculations, or mode switching.
title: Complete UI simplification for equilibrium calculator
